mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_triage_record WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ai_triage_record WHERE risk_level = 'urgent' OR risk_level = 'critical' ORDER BY triage_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_triage_record ( patient_id, patient_name, patient_age, patient_gender, symptom_description, recommend_dept_id, recommend_dept_name, recommend_doctor_id, recommend_doctor_name, risk_level, is_priority, ai_analysis, register_id, session_id, triage_time, model_id ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{patientAge}, #{patientGender}, #{symptomDescription}, #{recommendDeptId}, #{recommendDeptName}, #{recommendDoctorId}, #{recommendDoctorName}, #{riskLevel}, #{isPriority}, #{aiAnalysis},
#{registerId} NULL , #{sessionId}, #{triageTime}, #{modelId} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_triage_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY triage_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_triage_record SET symptom_description = #{symptomDescription}, recommend_dept_id = #{recommendDeptId}, recommend_dept_name = #{recommendDeptName}, recommend_doctor_id = #{recommendDoctorId}, recommend_doctor_name = #{recommendDoctorName}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, is_priority = #{isPriority}, ai_analysis = #{aiAnalysis}, register_id = #{registerId} WHERE id = #{id}
